stemHtml:
An aircraft arriving at Paris CDG receives the following ATIS:

"This is CDG Information India recorded at 1431 UTC.
Approach 4E, En ILS 09L and Approach 4E, 4N ILS 08R.
Landing Runway: 09L and 08R.
Transition level 70.
Wind: 180°/13 kt
Present weather: CAVOK.
Temperature: 13.
Dew point: 2.
QNH: 1003.
Confirm ATIS India received on first contact. "

According to ICAO Annex 11, this arrival ATIS is...

options.a: Incorrect because the type of approach is mentioned.
options.b: Incorrect because the RVRs are NOT mentioned.
options.c: Incorrect because the SNOWTAM is missing.
